violations.text: Various food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025
The walk-in cooler gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

The floor in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025
Foot items were observed stored on the floor in the upstairs storage area and in the walk . Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023

The ceiling tiles in the sales area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment must replace damaged drop ceiling tiles, so they can adequately inspect for leaks New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2023
